summary: Verified bug fixes: 1) Fixed amount voucher (50 Kč) correctly deducts from booking price - coupon field hidden, voucher badge shows, price displays strikethrough with '50 Kč' discount. 2) Admin gallery management tab working with full CRUD functionality.

issues: EmailPopup blocks interactions on page load - users must close it first. Minor UX friction but noted.

passed_tests: POST /api/vouchers creates voucher with fixed_amount type (discount_type='fixed_amount', discount_value=50)
GET /api/vouchers/:code returns fixed_amount voucher with display_discount showing '50 Kč' NOT '50 %'
POST /api/vouchers/:code/claim returns correct discount_type='fixed_amount' and discount_value=50
POST /api/admin/gallery/projects creates new project with all required fields
GET /api/admin/gallery/projects returns list of all projects (admin)
GET /api/gallery/projects returns only published projects (public)
PATCH /api/admin/gallery/projects/:id updates a project
DELETE /api/admin/gallery/projects/:id deletes a project
Admin gallery endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Voucher landing page /poukaz/TEST50KORUNA shows '50 Kč' (not '%')
Booking page Step 4 - active voucher badge visible showing 'Poukaz aktivní: TEST50KORUNA / 50 Kč sleva'
Booking page Step 4 - coupon field HIDDEN when voucher is active (not in DOM)
Booking page Step 4 - price summary shows strikethrough on original price (400 Kč)
Booking page Step 4 - getFinalPrice() correctly calculates 400-50=350 Kč
Booking page Step 4 - shows 'Sleva 50 Kč' text in price summary
Admin Gallery tab visible in sidebar with label 'Galerie'
Admin Gallery form has all fields: title, category, location, date, description, before_image URL, after_image URL
Admin Gallery preview button shows error toast when image URL invalid
Admin Gallery 'Zobrazit na webu' checkbox for publish control
Gallery page /nase-prace loads with filter buttons and project cards
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_fixed_voucher_and_gallery.py - Created new test file for fixed voucher and gallery CRUD testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all voucher and gallery features working correctly)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST50OFF and TEST50KORUNA vouchers for testing fixed_amount discount type
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two bug fixes verified: 1) Fixed amount voucher now correctly shows '50 Kč' on voucher landing page and applies correctly on booking page step 4 - coupon field is hidden when voucher active, price shows strikethrough with correct deduction (400-50=350). 2) Admin Gallery tab at /admin#gallery has full CRUD: create project with before/after image URLs, preview, publish toggle, edit, delete. Public gallery page /nase-prace fetches from /api/gallery/projects and falls back to SAMPLE_PROJECTS when empty.

bug_1_fixed_amount_voucher.description: Fixed amount voucher (e.g. 50 Kč) not deducting from booking price
bug_1_fixed_amount_voucher.root_cause: display_discount was showing 'Sleva 0%' instead of applying fixed discount
evidence: Booking page step 4 shows voucher badge with '50 Kč sleva'
Coupon field is HIDDEN (not in DOM) when voucher active
Price summary shows: original 400 Kč (strikethrough), Sleva 50 Kč, final ~350 Kč

bug_2_admin_gallery.description: Admin gallery management tab for managing before/after photo projects
evidence: Gallery tab visible in admin sidebar
Form with all fields: title, category, location, date, description, before_image, after_image
Preview buttons work with error feedback for invalid URLs
CRUD operations working: create, list, update, delete
